hero.subtitle: While competitors think — you're already ahead

manifest.label: Our manifesto
manifest.body: Automation is not technology for its own sake. It's a competitive advantage that works right now, while others are still deciding.

footer.tagline: We automate businesses with AI agents, Telegram bots and modern web solutions. While competitors think — you're already ahead.
footer.manifesto: The future is not scary. We'll guide you through.

steps.title: Brief
steps.text: You tell us about the task. We ask the right questions — not as a formality, but to understand the core.
steps.hint: Call or chat — whatever works for you

steps.title: Strategy
steps.text: We propose a solution, stack and timeline. No fluff — a concrete plan with clear outcomes.
steps.hint: You see everything before we start — no surprises

steps.title: Development
steps.text: We write, build, test. We keep you in the loop at every stage. We work fast, without sacrificing quality.
steps.hint: Status updates throughout — no black boxes

steps.title: Launch
steps.text: We deploy, configure, hand over. And stay close — supporting and growing after launch.
steps.hint: We don't say goodbye — we keep working

tech.label: Technology
tech.heading: Battle-tested — four working stacks
tech.subtext: Every stack was built on real projects. We take what works and adapt it to your case — no rebuilding from scratch.

stacks.title: 24/7 AI support bot
stacks.desc: Handles requests, answers 80% of FAQs, escalates complex cases to a human manager.

stacks.title: Lead qualification in chat
stacks.desc: Bot runs the dialogue → rule-based scoring → CRM card with notes for the manager.

stacks.title: Content machine with approval
stacks.desc: Drafts posts, sends them to Telegram for signoff, publishes after approval.

stacks.title: Production-ready site in 1–3 days
stacks.desc: From brief to production. Landings, MVPs, portfolios — like KvaKva in a day.

proof.kvakvaSubtitle: AI travel platform · built in 1 day →
proof.lbDescription: AI Travel platform for the CIS market — route planner, flights, hotels. From idea to production in one working day.
proof.lbTaskText: AI travel planning service tailored to CIS realities: visas, maps, accessible routes and prices.
proof.lbSolutionText: Next.js + Claude Haiku (OpenRouter). AI generates detailed itineraries based on budget, days and user preferences.

items.title: Telegram bots
items.description: We automate lead intake, consultations and notifications. The bot works 24/7 without your involvement — clients get instant responses at any time.

items.title: AI assistants
items.tagline: A smart employee without a salary
items.description: Assistants built on Claude and GPT-4. They understand context, process documents and respond like a real employee — just 10x faster.

items.title: Automation
items.tagline: 10–30 hours a week — back to you
items.description: We connect CRM, messengers, spreadsheets and services into one system. Manual work becomes automated processes — without your involvement.

items.title: Operating systems
items.description: We build full operational infrastructure turnkey: CRM, communications, analytics and automation — in one system that works without you.

items.title: Websites
items.description: Corporate sites and landing pages with design that's remembered. Fast, responsive, with animations — and real leads as output.

about.label: About
about.founderBio1: AutomatikaLab is the flagship product of AutomatikaGroup. We specialize in business process automation, AI integration, web design and post-production.
about.founderBio2: We work with small and medium businesses across CIS. We understand the market — we know what actually works, not just what looks good on paper. Based in Kazakhstan, clients across CIS.
about.philHeading1: AutomatikaLab — a new kind of agency
about.philBody1: We don't sell services — we build systems. Every project starts with understanding the business and ends with working automation that delivers results.
about.philBody2: Tools are chosen for the task, not the other way around. We work with what delivers results today — and don't hold onto what was standard yesterday.
about.philBody3: A broad stack — from automation and AI agents to web development and video production. Everything needed for results — under one roof.
about.agentBody: We don't hire people for every task — we build agents. Every project goes through a system of specialized AI agents: from brief to deploy.

principles.title: Autonomously
principles.desc: Processes run without manual intervention — agents handle, verify and pass tasks forward on their own.

principles.title: From day one
principles.desc: Automation is built into the process, not added at the end. Every project is built to run without us.

principles.title: Inside and out
principles.desc: We automate ourselves the same way we automate our clients. This isn't marketing — it's how the studio works.

projects.title: Atmosfera Foodcourt
projects.description: A food court with four kitchens under one roof. We built the site with an online ordering system and automated order processing — rated 4.9 with 1700+ reviews.

projects.title: KvaKva
projects.description: Everything a traveler needs in one place. Route planning, cheap flight search, hotel booking, event tours and an AI assistant to build the perfect trip.

projects.title: Office Assistant
projects.description: A universal AI system for working with data. Deployed in any business: analyzes documents, answers requests, automates routine. First case — corporate bank environment.

contact.label: Ready for the next step?
contact.heading: Let's start?
contact.body: Tell us about the task — we'll handle the rest
